subcodes.first_line: O ye two servants of God, loving brothers, who have attained unto the sacred precincts of the All-Merciful and laid your heads at the threshold of Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بنده حق برادر مهربان ببقعه رحمان رسید و سر باستان نهاد و از درگاه جمال
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @education of children; moral education, @service to others; to the Cause of God
